comments.text: Albania is one of Europe's most underrated destinations. It's definitely a country that deserves far more attention from travelers.

comments.author: @NICEGLOBE05
comments.text: Albania is hands down the best-kept secret in Europe right now. To be able to enjoy crystal-clear Riviera beaches, luxury boutique hotels, and world-class seafood for a fraction of what you’d pay in Italy or Greece is mind-blowing. It truly is a dream destination. Incredible 4K footage!

comments.author: @RealLifeGlobalDocumentary
comments.text: Sometimes the places we know the least about end up being the most interesting.Thanks for the documentary. It was refreshing to see a side of Albania beyond the usual stereotypes.

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: Thank you so much for saying that. Albania really is one of those places that surprises you the more you learn about it. Beyond the old stereotypes, there is so much beauty, history, hospitality, and everyday life that deserves to be seen. I’m really glad the documentary gave you a refreshing view.

comments.author: @RadicalTek
comments.text: If it is so great, why do working men flee?😅😅😅

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: That’s a fair question 😅 Albania is beautiful and full of culture, but like many countries, many working men leave mainly because of limited job opportunities, lower wages, and hopes for a better income abroad. Loving your country and needing to work elsewhere can both be true at the same time.
